CustomField.formula: /*Eye Surgery condition*/ IF( Site_Code__c ="84" && domain2__c="ניתוחי עיניים", "https://"&$Setup.Form_Titan_Domain__c.Domain__c&"/AssutaEyeSurgery?fld366="&formtitan_id_2__c, IF( DATEVALUE(CreatedDate) < DATE(2020,12,08), ("https://"&$Setup.Form_Titan_Domain__c.Domain__c&"/Surgery-SMS-Old?fld366="&formtitan_id_2__c ), ("https://"&$Setup.Form_Titan_Domain__c.Domain__c&"/Surgery-SMS?fld366="&formtitan_id_2__c)))
CustomField.label: Surgery Kit Link
